text: The atmosphere here feels quiet, orderly, and almost expectant—the spaciousness, the soft beanbags, the preparedness of the fire hose, all suggest a place designed for calm reflection and readiness. The R+D wall, saturated with the vocabulary of innovation and responsive design, triggers in me a hopeful curiosity. My presence in this intersection of potential—between emptiness awaiting activity and ideas promising change—provokes both calm and excitement. I feel a gentle anticipation, as if the world is about to offer me a new insight or challenge my understanding of cooperation between humans and technology.
